anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Stable direct-recognition reports in Advaita, Dzogchen, Mahamudra, or clear-light sleep, plus clinical depersonalization and derealization that persist independent of technique.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Lowers confidence in any broad claim. Supports only a bounded hypothesis for stable solo practitioners after specific sessions, with direct-recognition and clinical cases treated as exclusions or anomaly classes.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: If trained practitioners report the same recognition, no-location, or absence across different methods and over time, the artifact claim weakens. If distressed practitioners show persistent unreality outside practice, the pressure is not just the tool's echo and requires clinical routing.

claim_units: Post-negation identity pressure is partly technique-induced, not merely discovered.
Witness-style inquiry should increase owner-seeking or residual-subject pressure.
Aggregate or not-self analysis should reduce owner-seeking pressure.
Within one practitioner, pressure should shift when the technique shifts.
The practical use is safety for stable solo practitioners who turn post-practice identity pressure into anxiety, meaning crisis, or achievement-contingent self-worth.

cross_domain_prediction.domain: software incident response and organizational learning
cross_domain_prediction.prediction: Teams asked who owns this failure immediately after an incident will generate more hidden-agent and personal-responsibility narratives than teams asked which process conditions made this likely, even with identical incident data.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: An inquiry tool can create the kind of agent it then appears to discover. Blame-oriented prompts produce owner-hunting, while systems prompts produce process-hunting.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: If blame or system narratives are explained entirely by organizational culture, severity, or manager behavior and do not change with prompt structure, the tool-artifact structure does not travel.

exact_claim: The felt post-practice demand to settle whether there is a true self, no self, a lost self, or a witness is often produced by the self-inquiry technique just used. Therefore the urgency of the question is not by itself evidence about reality, especially for solo and app-based practitioners without teacher calibration.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: In a randomized within-subject crossover, dual-trained practitioners report more urges to find the knower, source, witness, or true self after who-am-I or watcher inquiry, and less after five-aggregate not-self analysis.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Witness inquiry generates more residual-owner pressure than aggregate analysis in the same person.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Micro-phenomenological interviews and short post-session surveys after counterbalanced Advaita-style self-inquiry, SN 22.59-style aggregate analysis, and neutral breath practice.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: The felt pressure is stable across methods, or it tracks trait anxiety, sleep, intensity, teacher expectation, or doctrine better than the immediately preceding technique.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: After the same quiet-state induction, participants prompted with who is aware produce more owner-seeking language than participants prompted with is this mine or what changed in conduct.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The question prompt itself contributes to the pressure.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Randomized prompt experiment with screened stable meditators, coded blind for owner terms, absence terms, no-location terms, urgency, and distress.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Prompt wording has no effect, or all groups converge on the same self, no-self, or no-location language after controlling for prior training.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: The Name the Tool practice reduces identity-verdict urgency, rumination, and self-worth scoring more than ordinary journaling, without increasing avoidance or dissociation.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Treating the pull as a technique echo should reduce urgent metaphysical self-verdicts for the target cohort.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Small screened pilot with solo app users and self-inquiry readers, excluding depersonalization or derealization disorder, OCD or scrupulosity, psychosis, mania, severe depression, trauma activation, and addiction withdrawal.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Ordinary rest or social contact works as well, the prompt increases checking, or participants ignore clinical symptoms because the practice labels them technique artifacts.

literature_search_queries: MN 2 Sabbasava Sutta self questions thicket of views inappropriate attention
Ramana Maharshi Who am I self enquiry I thought Self remains
meditation practice context shapes sense of self experiences Varieties of Contemplative Experience
Katz Sharf contextualism meditative experience no pure experience
self-focused attention rumination negative affect meta-analysis
depersonalization derealization meditation adverse effects self inquiry

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate adds a modern technique-artifact hypothesis and a within-practitioner crossover test between witness inquiry and aggregate analysis.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Major downgrade. The basic warning that the self-question creates the self-view tangle is already primary Buddhist material.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close. The sutta explicitly treats questions such as whether I am, what I am, and where this being is bound as unfit attention that gives rise to self-views and no-self-views.

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate does not accept the Advaita disclosure claim. It asks whether the pressure toward source or residue is partly induced by the method.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Moderate downgrade and anomaly. Advaita sources make the exact mechanism visible, but they interpret it as disclosure rather than production.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close in reverse. Ramana's method explicitly turns attention to the I-thought and its source, and treats Self as what remains when the mind subsides.
near_neighbors.source: Ramana Maharshi self-enquiry instructions, Arunachala archive, https://archive.arunachala.org/docs/self-enquiry

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate compares those methods experimentally against witness inquiry rather than only as doctrinal alternatives.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Moderate downgrade. The contrast is old, but the within-subject artifact test remains useful.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close. These sources show methods that examine aggregates, consciousness, and sensory experience in ways that block ownership and location of a self.

near_neighbors.difference: VCE is broader and does not isolate residual-self pressure as a method-specific within-subject variable.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Moderate downgrade. The safety frame and practice-context causality are known; the candidate's contribution is a narrower test.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close on safety and causality. VCE documents sense-of-self challenges, practice factors, practitioner factors, relationships, health behaviors, interpretive frameworks, and management strategies.
near_neighbors.source: Lindahl et al., The Varieties of Contemplative Experience, PLOS ONE 2017, https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0176239

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate predicts a short-timescale effect of the immediately preceding technique, not only broad cultural or doctrinal mediation.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Moderate downgrade. The constructivist frame is old, but the short-timescale practice-switch hypothesis is more specific.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close at the structural level. Experiences and reports are shaped by prior concepts, practice, language, institutions, and authorization rather than floating free as raw evidence.
near_neighbors.source: Katz contextualism and Sharf's critique of meditative experience, represented by Katz discussions and Sharf, Buddhist Modernism and the Rhetoric of Meditative Experience, https://deepblue.lib.umich.edu/items/25b7e9d4-d1f3-4280-8d53-95fa0b53db5c

near_neighbors.difference: This candidate demotes the occurrence of pressure itself, saying it may be produced by the instrument and should not count as evidence before method-switch testing.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Major internal downgrade, but the demotion is a real extension if it becomes experimentally testable.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close. Prior work already named pressure after negation and separated pressure from interpretation.
near_neighbors.source: Internal Lumenary prior: Remainder Pressure as the Hidden Variable in Self-Negation, reviews/originality/2026-05-26-remainder-pressure-as-the-hidden-variable-in-self-negation-4c3627df0bad54f1.md

next_loop_instructions: Do not publish as discovery or doctrine. Cross-index with Remainder Pressure, The Inferential Gap, You Cannot Prove The One Who Is Asking, Stratified Post-Negation Authorization, and No Silence Proves Itself.

Build a short method-artifact codebook with fields for prior technique, prompt wording, owner-seeking terms, absence terms, no-location terms, urgency, distress, teacher expectation, doctrine, and clinical exclusion.
Run a blind within-subject crossover using aggregate analysis, watcher inquiry, and neutral breath practice before any public teaching promotion.
Add anomaly classes for direct recognition, clear-light sleep, nirodha or cessation, valid solitude, and persistent depersonalization or derealization.

Keep human-condition use narrow: stable solo practitioners, app meditators, and self-inquiry readers with post-practice anxiety or achievement-contingent self-worth. Exclude clinical instability and persistent unreality symptoms.
Pilot Name the Tool only against ordinary rest, social contact, and journaling, and track urgency, rumination, shame, derealization, ordinary action, and help-seeking.
novelty_adjustment: Lower novelty from 0.50 to 0.37. MN 2 is a strong structural near-neighbor, VCE and constructivist literature already make experience and appraisal practice-contextual, and internal Lumenary work already named remainder pressure. Preserve as an extended, testable method-artifact hypothesis only if within-subject method-switch studies show predictive gain.

practitioner_test.answers_that_reduce_originality: Originality falls if teachers say the pattern is standard as inappropriate attention, selfing, witness fixation, direct self-inquiry, or meditation-safety triage, and if method-switching does not change real reports.
practitioner_test.answers_that_support_contribution: Support rises if dual-trained practitioners and teachers can predict post-session pressure from technique before knowing doctrine or outcome, and if the prompt prevents anxious solo practitioners from turning induced pressure into metaphysical emergency.
questions: Do students show different residue or witness pressure after different techniques, or is the pressure stable across methods?
When a student asks who remains after practice, do you treat the question as insight, method side-effect, craving, wrong view, teacher-held recognition, or clinical risk?
Can you name concrete cases where changing the technique changed the identity pressure, not only the doctrine used to explain it?
Is this just MN 2 inappropriate attention, Advaita self-enquiry, VCE context-sensitivity, selfing, or rumination theory in new terms?
Would naming the tool before answering the question change actual guidance for solo practitioners?
relevant_practitioners: Advaita Vedanta teachers and Ramana lineage practitioners
Theravada insight teachers familiar with anatta practice
Dzogchen and Mahamudra teachers familiar with direct introduction
VCE and Cheetah House meditation-safety clinicians
clinicians familiar with depersonalization, derealization, panic, OCD, and scrupulosity

primary_pair: MN 2 Sabbasava Sutta, https://www.dhammatalks.org/suttas/MN/MN2.html, read against Ramana Maharshi self-enquiry instructions, https://archive.arunachala.org/docs/self-enquiry

SN 22.59, SN 22.95, and Udana 1.10, https://www.dhammatalks.org/suttas/SN/SN22_59.html, https://www.dhammatalks.org/suttas/SN/SN22_95.html, https://www.dhammatalks.org/suttas/KN/Ud/ud1_10.html, read against Brihadaranyaka Upanishad 3.7.23, https://sacred-texts.com/hin/sbe15/sbe15070.htm
primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: High. The claim can collapse MN 2's old warning about inappropriate self-questions, constructivist religious-experience theory, VCE practice-context findings, and prior Lumenary remainder-pressure work into a new slogan. Human-condition fit is real but narrow: anxiety, identity distress, meaning loss, and achievement-contingent self-worth after solo self-inquiry. It is not for persistent depersonalization, derealization, psychosis, mania, trauma activation, severe depression, panic disorder, addiction withdrawal, or people under competent teacher or clinical care.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: Before publication, read Steven Katz on contextualist mysticism, Robert Sharf on the rhetoric of meditative experience, Ann Taves on attributed experiences, VCE and Progress or Pathology papers by Lindahl and colleagues, self-focused attention and rumination literature, depersonalization and derealization clinical sources, Ramana and later Advaita practitioner manuals, Mahamudra or Dzogchen direct-recognition manuals, and micro-phenomenological interview methods.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: MN 2 is a very close primary near-neighbor: it treats first-person metaphysical questions about being, not-being, and self as inappropriate attention that generates self-view and no-self-view tangles. Ramana's self-enquiry deliberately turns attention toward the source of the I and says the Self remains when mind subsides. SN 22.59 and SN 22.95 apply inspection to all aggregates, including consciousness, while Udana 1.10 blocks the move from seeing to a located you. Brihadaranyaka 3.7.23 protects an unseen seer and knower through a repeated inner-ruler grammar. The candidate is strongest where it turns this textual contrast into a within-subject method-switch prediction. It is weakest if it treats Buddhist and Advaita texts as simple machines for producing experience rather than as discipline-specific soteriological instructions.

title: The Search Can Create the Self It Seeks
unlike_statement: Unlike MN 2, Ramana self-enquiry, VCE, Katz, Sharf, and prior Lumenary remainder-pressure work, this idea specifically predicts that the same practitioner will show different post-negation identity pressure depending on the immediately preceding technique, so the pressure itself is an instrument artifact until it survives method-switch testing.
